footnotes.text: Jesus enunciates a principle which will eventually free Christians, not only from the rabbinical traditions, but from the law concerning clean and unclean food. The Apostles themselves did not know, until they received further revelation, that they were freed from this law. Cf. Acts 10-11.
The departure of our Lord for the region of Tyre and Sidon begins a period in His life in which He devotes Himself chiefly to the instruction of the Apostles.
